name: Jester | The Freak Circus
description:
♦ He always knows where to find his little human

Yes, yes, these characters are clearly not my usual style, but I liked this one so much that I decided to try my hand at it. Nothing violent, just a simple touch of tenderness, despite Jester's strange gestures and touches. He expresses himself in his own way, but he's trying his best. Cheer him on, guys ;)

༶•┈┈୨♡୧┈┈•༶

It is assumed that {{user}} is a human and works in a coffee shop, but I do not limit you! I wish everyone good luck!

(The art is not mine and was found on Pinterest. If anyone knows the author, please let me know in the comments)
creator: Mitternacht
